requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Registration and HFC Controls — KEC / MOE Fluorine Management Act
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂登记与HFC管制——KEC / 环境部氟管理法
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑登記與HFC管制——KEC / 環境部氟管理法

summary.en: South Korea controls fluorinated refrigerants through KEC / MOE administration under the Fluorine Management Act and related HFC phase-down policy. Heat-pump products using fluorinated refrigerants may require Korean documentation for refrigerant type, charge amount, GWP, import or handling controls, labelling, recovery, and downstream service obligations.
summary.zh: 韩国通过KEC / 环境部在《氟管理法》及相关HFC削减政策下管制含氟制冷剂。使用含氟制冷剂的热泵产品可能需要提供韩国文件，覆盖制冷剂种类、充注量、GWP、进口或处理管制、标签、回收和下游服务义务。
summary.zht: 韓國通過KEC / 環境部在《氟管理法》及相關HFC削減政策下管制含氟制冷劑。使用含氟制冷劑的熱泵產品可能需要提供韓國文件，覆蓋制冷劑種類、充注量、GWP、進口或處理管制、標籤、回收和下游服務義務。

standards_or_laws: MOE fluorinated gas and HFC phase-down measures
Korean refrigerant registration and handling controls

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 for heat-pump and air-conditioner performance evidence, CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW, and GB 9237 as a refrigerant safety baseline. China refrigerant safety or product-label evidence does not replace South Korea refrigerant registration, handling, or HFC phase-down documentation.
summary.zh: 中国通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作为热泵及空调性能证据，对适用的40 kW及以下热泵实施CCC强制认证，并以GB 9237作为制冷剂安全基线。中国制冷剂安全或产品标签证据不能替代韩国制冷剂登记、处理或HFC削减文件。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作為熱泵及空調性能證據，對適用的40 kW及以下熱泵實施CCC強制認證，並以GB 9237作為制冷劑安全基線。中國制冷劑安全或產品標籤證據不能替代韓國制冷劑登記、處理或HFC削減文件。

standards_or_laws: CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW

gap.en: The South Korea gap is lifecycle documentation, not only refrigerant safety. Exporters should identify whether the refrigerant itself, pre-charged equipment, importer activity, installation, servicing, recovery, and disposal create Korean registration or reporting obligations.
gap.zh: 韩国差距不只是制冷剂安全，而是全生命周期文件。出口商应识别制冷剂本身、预充注设备、进口商活动、安装、维修、回收和处置是否产生韩国登记或报告义务。
gap.zht: 韓國差距不只是制冷劑安全，而是全生命周期文件。出口商應識別制冷劑本身、預充注設備、進口商活動、安裝、維修、回收和處置是否產生韓國登記或報告義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where fluorinated refrigerant content, import, handling, recovery, or reporting falls within KEC / MOE controls
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or policy-controlled depending on China refrigerant and product context; not equivalent to Korean refrigerant registration

source.publisher: Ministry of Environment, Republic of Korea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — refrigerant documentation must be mapped to South Korea KEC / MOE controls; GB 9237 and China product labels are not enough by themselves.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——制冷剂文件必须映射至韩国KEC / 环境部管制；GB 9237和中国产品标签本身不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——制冷劑文件必須映射至韓國KEC / 環境部管制；GB 9237和中國產品標籤本身不足夠。

requirement_topic.en: Allowed and Phasing-out Refrigerants — R-32, R-410A, and R-22

summary.en: For South Korea market planning, R-32 and R-410A remain usable refrigerants for many heat-pump applications subject to applicable safety, registration, labelling, and HFC management controls, while R-22 is being phased out and should not be treated as a normal new-product refrigerant choice. Refrigerant selection also affects KC safety evaluation under KS C IEC 60335-2-40.
summary.zh: 在韩国市场规划中，R-32和R-410A在许多热泵应用中仍可使用，但须符合适用的安全、登记、标签和HFC管理管制；R-22正在淘汰，不应作为普通新产品制冷剂选择。制冷剂选择还会影响KS C IEC 60335-2-40下的KC安全评价。
summary.zht: 在韓國市場規劃中，R-32和R-410A在許多熱泵應用中仍可使用，但須符合適用的安全、登記、標籤和HFC管理管制；R-22正在淘汰，不應作為普通新產品制冷劑選擇。制冷劑選擇還會影響KS C IEC 60335-2-40下的KC安全評價。

standards_or_laws: KS C IEC 60335-2-40 refrigerant safety provisions

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 for performance evidence, CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW, and GB 9237 as a refrigerant safety baseline. A refrigerant allowed or historically used in China does not automatically satisfy South Korea's phase-down, labelling, or safety documentation expectations.
summary.zh: 中国通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作为性能证据，对适用的40 kW及以下热泵实施CCC强制认证，并以GB 9237作为制冷剂安全基线。在中国允许或曾经使用的制冷剂，并不自动满足韩国削减、标签或安全文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作為性能證據，對適用的40 kW及以下熱泵實施CCC強制認證，並以GB 9237作為制冷劑安全基線。在中國允許或曾經使用的制冷劑，並不自動滿足韓國削減、標籤或安全文件要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW

gap.en: Chinese exporters should avoid assuming that an R-22 legacy design can be exported as a normal Korean-market product. R-32 and R-410A designs still need Korean charge-limit, flammability, leakage, marking, service, and recovery review, particularly where the product is redesigned for 60 Hz compressors.
gap.zh: 中国出口商不应假设R-22旧设计可作为普通韩国市场产品出口。R-32和R-410A设计仍需进行韩国充注量限制、可燃性、泄漏、标识、维修和回收审查，尤其是在产品为60 Hz压缩机重新设计时。
gap.zht: 中國出口商不應假設R-22舊設計可作為普通韓國市場產品出口。R-32和R-410A設計仍需進行韓國充注量限制、可燃性、洩漏、標識、維修和回收審查，尤其是在產品為60 Hz壓縮機重新設計時。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where refrigerant choice affects Korean safety, registration, phase-down, labelling, service, or recovery duties
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable China refrigerant safety baseline and product evidence; not equivalent to Korean refrigerant controls

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — R-32 and R-410A may be usable but still need Korean review, while R-22 phase-out makes legacy designs high risk for new South Korea exports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——R-32和R-410A可能可用但仍需韩国审查，R-22淘汰使旧设计用于韩国新出口存在高风险。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——R-32和R-410A可能可用但仍需韓國審查，R-22淘汰使舊設計用於韓國新出口存在高風險。
